generated_on: RTX 4070 Laptop (sm_89), 8 GB VRAM, 32 GB RAM, Windows 11
recommended_mode_rationale: Qwen 2.5 1.5B is the only model in the M4.6 fixture where fast mode passes ADR-004 strict (drift 0.18 < 0.5 with 2.7× margin) AND argmax stays 4/4. The Qwen training profile (with QKV bias terms and a modest hidden_size 1536) appears more tolerant of BF16 activation truncation than the rest of the family. Fast mode is recommended for production; certified mode remains available for any workload where the additional 22× drift margin is required (research, audited deployments).
per_tensor_policy_status: Reserved for M10.3+ dispatcher. Qwen's tolerance under fast mode suggests every weight could safely take the fast path; the v2 manifest may simply mirror that. The QKV bias tensors (unique to Qwen in this fixture) are a candidate for explicit fast-path certification.
